title: First Read-Only Generated Adapter Closeout
summary: #359 generated the first read-only root CLI adapter path for `defaults` from command_adapter_generation.json. #360 remains open for broader generated-adapter drift and conformance guardrails, and #356 remains open as the parent lane.
